updatedFor: Validation evidence review-gate platform, production-agent validation matrix, suite reliability budget, and CI gate truth
claimBoundary: No release-claim expansion. Gate results improve local public-beta execution evidence only; production, release-candidate, hosted/team, universal-channel, arbitrary-scale, compliance, managed-support, and unattended-operation claims require separate final decisions.

changedWhen: channel adapter, Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, slash/action/presence, session-link, trusted target, or connector behavior changes
focusedGates: npx vitest run src/__tests__/channel-commands.test.ts src/__tests__/telegram.test.ts src/__tests__/channel-connectors.test.ts --reporter=dot
productionAgentSurfaces.safeNextAction: Run the focused channel gate first, update capability or waiver evidence, then run full verify and the local-only review gate.

changedWhen: scheduler, worker lease, capacity, queue, cancellation, cleanup, or backpressure behavior changes
productionAgentSurfaces.safeNextAction: Run focused scheduler/fleet tests, capture cleanup/backpressure evidence, then rerun npm run verify.

changedWhen: work-store, storage repository, migration, backup, restore, or database adapter changes
focusedGates: npx vitest run src/__tests__/storage.test.ts src/__tests__/work-store.test.ts src/__tests__/backend-cli.test.ts --reporter=dot
productionAgentSurfaces.safeNextAction: Run focused storage and backend checks, preserve rollback-safe evidence, then rerun release checks.

changedWhen: dashboard, Mission Control view-model, operator action, status, pagination, or source-state rendering changes
productionAgentSurfaces.safeNextAction: Prove the source-state view model with focused tests before broad dashboard or docs validation.

changedWhen: release docs, machine-readable evidence, release copy, claim boundary, evidence safety, module-budget, or final decision changes
productionAgentSurfaces.safeNextAction: Run validation, release, evidence-safety, and module-boundary gates before full verify.

changedWhen: authz, security policy, runtime capability grants, secrets lifecycle, webhook verification, redaction, or exposed-mode behavior changes
productionAgentSurfaces.safeNextAction: Run focused security and redaction tests, then evidence safety and the review gate before merge.

changedWhen: setup, update, service lifecycle, diagnose, backup, restore, uninstall, incident bundle, support handoff, or release operations changes
focusedGates: npx vitest run src/__tests__/service-manager.test.ts src/__tests__/service-lifecycle.test.ts src/__tests__/daemon-lifecycle.test.ts --reporter=dot
productionAgentSurfaces.safeNextAction: Keep support exports redacted, run operation-focused tests, then release and evidence-safety gates.

changedWhen: agent profile, team, skill, MCP, connector package, eval suite, promotion, rollback, or package governance changes
productionAgentSurfaces.safeNextAction: Prove exact grants, eval gates, rollback path, and review-gate ownership before promotion wording.

changedWhen: MkDocs navigation, README, production readiness, operator runbook, onboarding, release notes, or public wording changes
productionAgentSurfaces.safeNextAction: Run strict docs and evidence safety; keep supported, bounded, waived, blocked, and deferred wording explicit.

failureDiagnostics.detection: A focused or full suite exceeds expected runtime but still completes deterministically.
failureDiagnostics.safeNextAction: Use the focused owner-surface gate to localize the change, then run npm run verify once the focused path is green.
failureDiagnostics.forbiddenShortcut: Do not skip full verify or raise timeouts without recording why the touched surface needs it.

failureDiagnostics.detection: A gate alternates pass/fail or depends on timing, external network, or uncontrolled state.
failureDiagnostics.safeNextAction: Reproduce with the smallest focused command, remove nondeterminism, rerun twice locally when useful, then run full verify.
failureDiagnostics.forbiddenShortcut: Do not mark flaky output as passed or hide it as an environment-only issue without evidence.

failureDiagnostics.detection: npm run release:check names a failed release/evidence gate.
failureDiagnostics.safeNextAction: Run npm run release:check, inspect the named failed check, update docs/evidence/scripts, then rerun evidence:safety when public wording changed.
failureDiagnostics.forbiddenShortcut: Do not bypass release:check or weaken unsupported-claim checks to make release wording pass.

failureDiagnostics.detection: npm run evidence:safety reports unsafe text, invalid JSON evidence, unsupported claim wording, or missing required references.
failureDiagnostics.safeNextAction: Fix the named file and line, regenerate machine evidence when needed, then rerun npm run evidence:safety and npm run release:check.
failureDiagnostics.forbiddenShortcut: Do not commit raw private paths, tokens, targets, transcript text, or unsupported positive claims.

failureDiagnostics.detection: The final diff lacks local-only read-only autoreview/review-gate PASS evidence.
failureDiagnostics.safeNextAction: Stop PR review or merge, run the local-only read-only review gate against the final committed diff from latest main, and record PASS or a blocker.
failureDiagnostics.forbiddenShortcut: Do not merge or request PR review without review-gate PASS evidence.

failureDiagnostics.detection: Strict MkDocs fails on navigation, links, markdown structure, or docs build configuration.
failureDiagnostics.safeNextAction: Fix the named docs issue, rerun strict MkDocs, and rerun release:check when release docs or navigation changed.
failureDiagnostics.forbiddenShortcut: Do not omit changed docs from navigation or release discoverability checks.

failureDiagnostics.detection: node scripts/check-module-boundaries.mjs --json reports new modules, edges, cycles, unresolved imports, or forbidden imports.
failureDiagnostics.safeNextAction: Reduce the dependency first; if intentional, add budget rationale and a forbidden-import guard before rerunning the boundary check.
failureDiagnostics.forbiddenShortcut: Do not raise module or edge budgets without rationale and an owner-specific guardrail.

evidenceTemplates.safeNextAction: Copy the owner-surface row, add exact files and gates, and keep no-PR-review-before-PASS wording explicit.
Record the command names/results and residual risk boundary without raw private evidence.
Keep summary JSON deterministic and fail closed with issue codes when acceptance drifts.
Ask the reviewer to inspect only local final diff and return REVIEW_GATE: PASS or FAIL with findings.
Classify each capability as supported, bounded, waived, blocked, or deferred before final release wording.

reviewGatePolicy.unavailableAction: Record a precise blocker in Linear and stop PR review or merge until the review gate can run and pass.

gates.title: TypeScript contract check
gates.requiredEnvironment: Node 22, installed npm dependencies, repo checkout

ci.skipSemantics: Not skipped on pull requests because it is part of npm run verify.

gates.title: Full Vitest suite
gates.requiredEnvironment: Node 22, installed npm dependencies, local temp directory access

ci.skipSemantics: Not skipped on pull requests because it is part of npm run verify.

gates.title: Package build
gates.requiredEnvironment: Node 22, installed npm dependencies, writable dist directory

ci.skipSemantics: Not skipped on pull requests because it is part of npm run verify.

gates.title: Release contract check
gates.requiredEnvironment: Node 22, built dist artifacts for npm pack verification

ci.skipSemantics: Not skipped on pull requests because it is part of npm run verify.

gates.title: Strict documentation build
gates.requiredEnvironment: Python 3.12, uv, docs requirements, repo checkout

gates.title: Docker image build, auth smoke, and scan
gates.requiredEnvironment: GitHub Actions pull_request event with Docker Buildx

ci.skipSemantics: Runs on pull requests after workflow-lint, test, and docs pass; builds locally, smokes scoped HTTP auth, and scans the image without publishing.

gates.title: Docker image publish, attest, sign, and scan
gates.requiredEnvironment: GitHub Actions push event with package write permission and Docker Buildx

ci.skipSemantics: Publish, provenance, signing, and pushed-image scan are skipped on pull requests by design; they run only on push after workflow-lint, test, and docs pass.

gates.title: GitHub release creation
gates.requiredEnvironment: GitHub Actions tag push matching refs/tags/v* after docker job succeeds

ci.skipSemantics: Skipped on pull requests and branch pushes; tag-only after the Docker image gate succeeds.

gates.title: Local-only read-only review gate
gates.ownerCommand: gateway-review-gate skill against the final committed diff from latest origin/main
gates.requiredEnvironment: Local repo checkout, no file edits, no network/web/remote context, no out-of-repo reads

ci.skipSemantics: Not a GitHub CI job; the worker/coordinator must record PASS evidence before PR review or merge.
Covered by npm run release:check inside npm run verify.

gates.title: Elapsed beta operation
gates.ownerCommand: operator-run elapsed local beta operation with daily redacted evidence (readiness, health, backups, evidence export)
gates.requiredEnvironment: Operator-owned local beta environment with daily redacted snapshots

ci.skipSemantics: Synthetic CI or local smoke cannot substitute for elapsed time.
